main.description: Subscribe to stream of chat events targeted to moderation. Private endpoint.

cursor.description: The last known event seq number to backfill from. Use '2222222222222' to backfill from the beginning. Don't specify a cursor to listen only for new events.

errors.name: ConsumerTooSlow
errors.description: If the consumer of the stream can not keep up with events, and a backlog gets too large, the server will drop the connection.

eventConvoFirstMessage.description: Fired when the first message was sent on a convo.

recipients.description: The list of DIDs message recipients. Does not include the sender, which is in the `user` field

user.description: The DID of the message author.

eventGroupChatCreated.description: Fire when a group chat is created.

actorDid.description: The DID of the actor performing the action. For this event, same as ownerDid.

convoCreatedAt.description: When the group was originally created.

groupMemberCount.description: Current member count at the time of the event.

groupName.description: The name set at creation time.

initialMemberDids.description: DIDs of everyone added at creation time.

ownerDid.description: The DID of the group chat owner.

eventGroupChatMemberAdded.description: Fired when a member is added to a group chat. Note that members are added in the 'request' state.

actorDid.description: The DID of the actor performing the action. For this event, same as ownerDid.

convoCreatedAt.description: When the group was originally created.

groupMemberCount.description: Current member count at the time of the event.

ownerDid.description: The DID of the group chat owner.

requestMembersCount.description: The number of members who have not yet accepted the convo.

subjectDid.description: The DID of the member who was added.

subjectFollowsOwner.description: Whether the added member follows the group owner.

eventGroupChatMemberJoined.description: Fired when a member joins a group chat via an join link that does not require approval.

actorDid.description: The DID of the person joining.

convoCreatedAt.description: When the group was originally created.

groupMemberCount.description: Current member count at the time of the event.

joinLinkCode.description: The code of the join link used to join.

ownerDid.description: The DID of the group chat owner.

subjectFollowsOwner.description: Whether the joining member follows the group owner.

eventGroupChatJoinRequest.description: Fired when a user requests to join a group chat via an join link that requires approval.

actorDid.description: The DID of the person requesting to join.

convoCreatedAt.description: When the group was originally created.

groupMemberCount.description: Current member count at the time of the event.

joinLinkCode.description: The code of the join link used to request joining.

ownerDid.description: The DID of the group chat owner.

subjectFollowsOwner.description: Whether the requesting member follows the group owner.

eventGroupChatJoinRequestApproved.description: Fired when a join request is approved by the group owner.

actorDid.description: The DID of the owner approving the request.

convoCreatedAt.description: When the group was originally created.

groupMemberCount.description: Current member count at the time of the event.

ownerDid.description: The DID of the group chat owner.

subjectDid.description: The DID of the member whose request was approved.

eventGroupChatJoinRequestRejected.description: Fired when a join request is rejected by the group owner.

actorDid.description: The DID of the owner rejecting the request.

convoCreatedAt.description: When the group was originally created.

groupMemberCount.description: Current member count at the time of the event.

ownerDid.description: The DID of the group chat owner.

subjectDid.description: The DID of the member whose request was rejected.

eventChatAccepted.description: Fired when a user accepts a chat convo, either explicitly or by sending a message.

actorDid.description: The DID of the person accepting the convo.

convoCreatedAt.description: When the convo was originally created.

groupMemberCount.description: Current member count at the time of the event. Only present for group convos.

groupName.description: The name of the group chat. Only present for group convos.

ownerDid.description: The DID of the group chat owner. Only present for group convos.

eventGroupChatMemberLeft.description: Fired when a member leaves or is removed from a group chat.

actorDid.description: The DID of the actor. For voluntary: the person leaving. For kicked: the owner.

convoCreatedAt.description: When the group was originally created.

groupMemberCount.description: Current member count at the time of the event.

ownerDid.description: The DID of the group chat owner.

subjectDid.description: The DID of the member who left or was removed.

eventGroupChatUpdated.description: Fired when a group chat's metadata or status changes.

actorDid.description: The DID of the actor performing the action (the owner).

convoCreatedAt.description: When the group was originally created.

groupMemberCount.description: Current member count at the time of the event.

joinLinkCode.description: The code of the join link. Only present when updateType is join-link-related.

joinLinkFollowersOnly.description: Whether the join link is restricted to followers of the owner. Only present when updateType is join-link-related.

joinLinkRequiresApproval.description: Whether the join link requires owner approval to join. Only present when updateType is join-link-related.

lockReason.description: Why the group was locked. Only present when updateType is 'locked'.

newName.description: The new group name. Only present when updateType is 'name_changed'.

oldName.description: The previous group name. Only present when updateType is 'name_changed'.

ownerDid.description: The DID of the group chat owner.

eventRateLimitExceeded.description: Fired when a user exceeds a rate limit.

actorDid.description: The DID of the user who hit the rate limit.

endpoint.description: The NSID of the endpoint that was rate limited.
